audit_items.proof_trace: get_data_size() returns int (a file size integer via ftell/fseek), not a pointer; no dereference of its return value occurs anywhere. The sole caller (parse_line, L141) stores the result in an unsigned int variable and uses it as a malloc size argument — there is no pointer dereference to NULL-check. The property assertion (r != NULL before deref(r)) is logically vacuous for an int return type.
